expectations.text: CollectionView displays messages from an ObservableCollection
expectations.evidence: ChatViewModel.cs line 14: 'public ObservableCollection<Message> Messages { get; } = new();' and ChatPage.xaml line 24: 'ItemsSource="{Binding Messages}"'

expectations.text: Message alignment differs by sender — right-aligned for current user, left-aligned for others
expectations.evidence: Message.cs lines 11-14: 'public Microsoft.Maui.Controls.LayoutOptions HorizontalAlignment => IsFromMe ? Microsoft.Maui.Controls.LayoutOptions.End : Microsoft.Maui.Controls.LayoutOptions.Start;' and ChatPage.xaml line 53: 'HorizontalOptions="{Binding HorizontalAlignment}"'

expectations.text: Code calls CollectionView.ScrollTo() to scroll to the last message when new messages arrive
expectations.evidence: ChatPage.xaml.cs lines 81-84: 'MessagesCollectionView.ScrollTo(item: message, position: ScrollToPosition.End, animate: animate);'

expectations.text: A CollectionChanged or property-change handler triggers the scroll behavior
expectations.evidence: ChatPage.xaml.cs line 23: '_viewModel.Messages.CollectionChanged += OnMessagesCollectionChanged;' and lines 47-61: 'private void OnMessagesCollectionChanged(...) { ... ScrollToLastMessage(animate: true); }'. Additionally, a custom MessageAdded event (ChatPage.xaml.cs line 19) also triggers scrolling via OnMessageAdded.

expectations.text: Message model has properties for content/text, a sender or IsFromMe flag, and optionally timestamp
expectations.evidence: Message.cs lines 5-8: 'public string Text { get; set; }', 'public string SenderName { get; set; }', 'public bool IsFromMe { get; set; }', 'public DateTime Timestamp { get; set; }'
